name: Papaya Chutney
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the skin from the papaya.
2. Cut the papaya in half and scoop out the center.
3. Chop the papaya finely.
4. Heat all ingredients in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat until they reach boiling point.
5. Reduce the heat to low, cover the skillet, and simmer for 40 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. The recipe yields approximately 1-1/4 cups of sauce with about 20 calories per tablespoon.
